name: BlackJack Math Cross Numbers
short_description: Tease your brain in this ambient logic game where you have to make the math match 21 as a result horizontal and vertically (because we're talking about blackjack, right?) Swap the cards, make the math, repeat. That's all you'll need in order to complete this game!
detailed_description:
Welcome to BlackJack Math Cross Numbers!

Tease your brain in this mix of crosswords with blackjack, in this game you need to match all the maths in the colums and lines with 21 as result.

Key Features

  • Hand-made levels that will test your math skills.

  • Originally composed music to keep you relaxed while solving the puzzles.
